name: PC CONNECTION INC
business: PC Connection provides IT solutions including computer systems, data center solutions, security, artificial intelligence, software, peripherals, networking, and accessories, along with design, configuration, and implementation services. It sells to large enterprises, small- to medium-sized businesses, and federal, state, and local government and educational institutions.
sellsTo: federal, state, and local government and educational institutions

exposures.sentence: We provide a wide range of IT solutions, from the desktop to the cloud including computer systems, data center solutions, security, artificial intelligence, or AI, software and peripheral equipment, networking communications, and other products and accessories that we develop internally and secure from manufacturers, distributors, and other suppliers.

We have developed and are investing in a core AI capability that is driven through our CNXN Helix effort, which was launched in 2023 and brings together industry-leading experts, resources, and support designed to help organizations of all sizes realize the benefits of AI and automation.
